name: Amperity
description: Amperity — Enterprise customer data platform that resolves identity across first-party data for marketing teams.

seo.title: Amperity — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Amperity: Amperity — Enterprise customer data platform that resolves identity across first-party data for marketing teams.

when_to_use: Identity resolution across first-party data sources
CDP replacing fragmented CRM + DMP for enterprise
Audience activation to paid media for retail brand
Data clean room for privacy-safe collaboration

pros: Best-in-class identity resolution with ML matching
Handles messy first-party data from many sources
Strong for retail and CPG with offline plus digital
Good privacy, governance, and compliance tooling
cons: Enterprise pricing closes out SMBs entirely
Heavy implementation before first real activation
Not a product analytics tool; marketing-focused
Requires data engineering skills to operate
review.verdict: The go-to CDP when identity stitching is your real problem; priced and scoped strictly for enterprise.
review.best_for: Enterprise retail, CPG, and hospitality brands needing unified customer identity at scale.
review.not_for: SMBs, digital-only products, or teams wanting product analytics instead of marketing activation.

lock_in.reason: Enterprise CDP with proprietary identity resolution graph
